result.phase_rationale: SER substrate restoration needed before any DA work (BBB transporter competition)

insights.title: Midday cortisol drops below the working range
insights.body: Healthy mornings followed by a midday collapse predict afternoon energy lows and burnout risk.

insights.title: DHEA reserve is low
insights.body: DHEA is the body's anabolic counter to cortisol. Low values suggest the adrenal cortex is running on empty.

insights.title: Cortisol is dominating DHEA
insights.body: The catabolic-to-anabolic ratio is well above the upper reference limit — characteristic of chronic allostatic load.

insights.title: Peripheral serotonin production is reduced
insights.body: Reflects gut-level serotonin production insufficiency, with downstream consequences for tryptophan availability for central serotonin synthesis. Not a measurement of brain serotonin.

insights.title: Dopamine output is below the reference floor
insights.body: Reduced dopamine throughput correlates with motivation, focus, and reward-seeking changes.

insights.title: Sympathetic dominance signature
insights.body: Noradrenaline is elevated relative to adrenaline — a chronic vigilance pattern.

patterns.name: Adrenal exhaustion + catabolic collapse
patterns.summary: DHEA is severely depleted while cortisol still dominates — extreme allostatic load.
